calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Appeal
Off Calendar Dec-03-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: no appearance by plaintiff's household finance corp; suzanne leung present matter augue and submitted.

MOTION (Notice Of) And Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Sep-17-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant Suzanne Leung appearing in Propria Persona, (415) 242-6109
RULING:
No other appearances on this matter. Defendant didn't inform moving party of her intent to appear to argue. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORP. OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION To Vacate And Set Aside Dismissal: GRANTED PER CCP 473(b). Prevailing party to submit proposed form of order. (301/JLW/NI-X) REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558.

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Aug-19-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Suzanne Leung, Defendant Propria Persona (415) 242-6109
Janet L. Brown, Esq., Eskanos & Adler (925) 969-1900 x3073 for Plaintiff Household Finance Corp
RULING:
Opposition was filed untimely. DEFENDANT SUZANNE LEUNG'S Motion To Dismiss: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Proposed form of order taken under submission. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jun-28-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Suzanne Leung, Defendant Propria Persona
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT SUZANNE LEUNG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND -- GRANTED with 10 days leave to file an answer. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-17-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SUZANNE LEUNG MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
RULING: NO APPEARNCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT SUZANNE LEUNG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND: DENIED; Motion was servied on 04/28/04, only 19 days before the hearing in violation of CCP 1005. (301/JLW/) REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR#1558
